violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (plates) were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in basement storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
Inspector observed commercially prepared ROP lobster thawing with its packaging still intact. PIC cut into package during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The floors and storage shelves in basement have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.PIC informed to clean and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
